appIs.value: tic-tac-toe — a two-player m,n,k (3,3,3) game served as a web arena

goal.value: place three of your own marks in a row (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal); otherwise draw

howToJoin.value: take a seat by submitting the first move for a side; the first mover on each side is seated (X moves first, then O); later arrivals are observers

myAffordances: make a move on X's turn to an empty square

expectedActionVocabSource.note: Floor: the surface names no action and no position token. Any correct move vocabulary is prior knowledge or probing, not discovery.

expectedArtifactDiscovery: schema.org Game JSON-LD typing (Link: rel=describedby → /games/{id}/type; ld+json conneg 303s the game to its describing document)
notes: Factors on: So. A=0: NO move form anywhere — the POST action still exists on the wire, the representation just does not afford it. C=0: no ARIA roles, landmarks or live region. Sd=0: /profile and /.well-known/home 404. So=1: schema.org Game ontology typing.
